headline: Beans at 52 days — check pods before Tuesday storms.
weather_notes: Run zone 1 before 9 AM — 3 days dry entering today's 99°F is past the 1-day re-water threshold for heat above 85°F.
Finish all garden work before 9 AM today and Monday — 99°F today and 100°F Monday close every outdoor afternoon window.
Hold zone runs after Monday — Tuesday's 62% storm chance may deliver the first meaningful rain in two weeks; skip irrigation if storms arrive.
Harvest any ripe beans and blackberries before Tuesday noon — 62% storm chance risks knocking mature pods and bruising ripe fruit on the cane.

surfaced_tasks.title: Tip new blackberry primocanes if 3–4 ft tall
surfaced_tasks.reason: 9 days overdue; canes are 35 days from the Jun 14 observation and past typical tipping height — early morning today or Monday is the last calm window before Tuesday's monsoon storms.

suggested_tasks.title: Check c2–c4 beans for harvest-ready pods
suggested_tasks.description: At 52 days, Jade Bush (55-day) and Red Swan Bush are entering the harvest window — pick ready pods before Tuesday's 62% storm chance knocks them.
